title: Vivarium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vivariums''' were specialized rooms that were used by the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. They were designed to keep germs and other bacterial organisms out during [[Shaping protocol|shapings]] and [[escalation]]s, essentially functioning as operating rooms.

In [[3951 BBY]], [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] working on [[Citadel Station]] maintained a similar type of vivarium within their enclave. Unlike the later Yuuzhan Vong version, however, this room used technology to help grow and maintain different types of plant life.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
